debug_info.goal:
c : ℤ
⊢ ∀ (X : FintypeCat), sorry (CategoryStruct.id X) = CategoryStruct.id (LightProfinite.FreeImage.component X c)

        simp_all [Nat.add_assoc]

by
        intro a ha
        simp only [set] at ha ⊢
        have h₁ : ∀ (i : Tj), |(h.toFun.comp a) i| = |a (h.invFun i)| := by
          intro i
          simp [Pi.zero_apply, MonoidHom.map_zero, Function.comp_apply]
          <;> aesop
        have h₂ : ∑ (i : Tj) in (h.toFun.comp a).support, |(h.toFun.comp a) i| ≤ ∑ (i : Tj) in (h.toFun.comp a).support, |a (h.invFun i)| := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro i _
          simp [h₁ i]
        have h₃ : ∑ (i : Tj) in (h.toFun.comp a).support, |a (h.invFun i)| ≤ c := by
          have h₄ : (h.toFun.comp a).support ⊆ Finset.image h.invFun (a.support) := by
            intro i hi
            simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Finset.mem_image, Finset.mem_coe] at hi ⊢
            simp_all [Pi.zero_apply, MonoidHom.map_zero, Function.comp_apply]
            <;> aesop
          have h₅ : ∑ (i : Tj) in (h.toFun.comp a).support, |a (h.invFun i)| ≤ ∑ (i : Tj) in (h.toFun.comp a).support, |a (h.invFun i)| := le_refl _
          have h₆ : ∑ (i : Tj) in (h.toFun.comp a).support, |a (h.invFun i)| ≤ ∑ (i : Si) in a.support, |a i| := by
            calc
              _ ≤ ∑ (i : Tj) in (h.toFun.comp a).support, |a (h.invFun i)| := by rfl
              _ = ∑ (i : Tj) in (h.toFun.comp a).support, |a (h.invFun i)| := by rfl
              _ ≤ ∑ (i : Si) in a.support, |a i| := by
                calc
                  _ = ∑ (i : Tj) in (h.toFun.comp a).support, |a (h.invFun i)| := by rfl
                  _ ≤ ∑ (i : Tj) in (h.toFun.comp a).support, |a (h.invFun i)| := by rfl
                  _ ≤ ∑ (i : Si) in a.support, |a i| := by
                    -- Use the fact that the sum of absolute values of the image is bounded by the sum of absolute values of the original set
                    have h₇ : ∀ (i : Tj), i ∈ (h.toFun.comp a).support → |a (h.invFun i)| ≤ |a (h.invFun i)| := by
                      intro i hi
                      simp_all
                    have h₈ : ∑ (i : Tj) in (h.toFun.comp a).support, |a (h.invFun i)| ≤ ∑ (i : Si) in a.support, |a i| := by
                      calc
                        _ = ∑ (i : Tj) in (h.toFun.comp a).support, |a (h.invFun i)| := by rfl
                        _ ≤ ∑ (i : Tj) in Finset.image h.invFun (a.support), |a (h.invFun i)| := by
                          apply Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg h₄
                          intro i hi
                          positivity
                        _ = ∑ (i : Si) in a.support, |a i| := by
                          calc
                            _ = ∑ (i : Tj) in Finset.image h.invFun (a.support), |a (h.invFun i)| := by rfl
                            _ = ∑ (i : Si) in a.support, |a i| := by
                              have h₉ : ∀ (s : Finset Si), ∑ (i : Tj) in Finset.image h.invFun s, |a (h.invFun i)| = ∑ (i : Si) in s, |a i| := by
                                intro s
                                calc
                                  _ = ∑ (i : Tj) in Finset.image h.invFun s, |a (h.invFun i)| := by rfl
                                  _ = ∑ (i : Tj) in Finset.image h.invFun s, |a (h.invFun i)| := by rfl
                                  _ = ∑ (x : Si) in s, |a x| := by
                                    have h₁₀ : ∀ (x : Si), x ∈ s → h.invFun (h.toFun x) = x := by
                                      intro x _
                                      simp [h.rightInverse]
                                    have h₁₁ : ∀ (x : Si), x ∈ s → h.invFun (h.toFun x) = x := by
                                      intro x _
                                      simp [h.rightInverse]
                                    calc
                                      _ = ∑ (i : Tj) in Finset.image h.invFun s, |a (h.invFun i)| := by rfl
                                      _ = ∑ (x : Si) in s, |a x| := by
                                        apply Finset.sum_bij (fun (x : Si) _ => h.toFun x)
                                        <;> simp_all [Function.Embedding.coeFn_eq_coe, Function.Injective]
                                        <;> aesop
                                      _ = ∑ (x : Si) in s, |a x| := by rfl
                              have h₁₂ : ∑ (i : Tj) in Finset.image h.invFun (a.support), |a (h.invFun i)| = ∑ (i : Si) in a.support,

(c : ℤ) : FintypeCat ⥤ LightProfinite where
  obj Si := component Si c
  map := sorry
  map_id := sorry

    intro X

by omega
      have h₇ : (2 : ℤ) * x + 3 < 0 := by
        have h₈ : (x : ℤ) ≤ 1 := by exact_mod_cast h₆
        nlinarith
      -- Since 2 * x + 3 < 0, it cannot be zero, but we need to use the given condition
      have h₈ : (2 : ℤ) * x + 3 ≠ 0 := by
        intro h₉
        linarith
      -- This leads to a contradiction because h₂ states that 2 * x + 3 ≠ 0
      simp_all [h₈]
      <;> omega
    -- From h₃ and h₄, we have x ≤ 2 and x ≥ 2, so x = 2
    omega
  
  -- Convert the final result to an integer
  norm_cast at h₁ ⊢
  <;> simp_all
